/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -std=c++17 -g -Os -ldl -fPIC -pthread -rdynamic -finline-functions -Wall -Wextra -Wshadow -Woverflow -Wcast-align -Wfatal-errors -Wpointer-arith -Wredundant-decls -Wunreachable-code -Wreturn-local-addr -Woverloaded-virtual -fno-omit-frame-pointer -Wunused-but-set-variable -Wsizeof-pointer-memaccess -Wno-dangling-else -Wno-unused-local-typedefs -Wtrampolines -Wdouble-promotion -Wsized-deallocation -Wvector-operation-performance -Wshift-overflow=2 -Wduplicated-cond -Wnull-dereference -static-libasan -fsanitize=address -static-libubsan -fsanitize=leak -fsanitize=vptr -fsanitize=null -fsanitize=shift -fsanitize=bounds -fsanitize=return -fsanitize=alignment -fsanitize=undefined -fsanitize=vla-bound -fsanitize=object-size -fsanitize=unreachable -fsanitize=bounds-strict -fsanitize=float-cast-overflow -fsanitize=float-divide-by-zero -fsanitize=integer-divide-by-zero -fsanitize=signed-integer-overflow -g  -shared -Wl,-soname,libkvioletd.so -o ../../lib/libkvioletd.so CMakeFiles/kvioletd.dir/actor/active.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kvioletd.dir/actor/actorface.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kvioletd.dir/actor/event.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kvioletd.dir/actor/statemachine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kvioletd.dir/efficient/annularcache.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kvioletd.dir/efficient/instwlinklist.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kvioletd.dir/efficient/twlinklist.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kvioletd.dir/logger/file.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kvioletd.dir/utilities/filesystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kvioletd.dir/utilities/math.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kvioletd.dir/utilities/net.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kvioletd.dir/utilities/string.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kvioletd.dir/utilities/time.cpp.o   -L/usr/local/lib  -L/usr/local/lib64  -Wl,-rpath,:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::
